title: Kitchen Maths Challenge
context: You run a small cafe. Today you need to make 20 portions of shepherd's pie. Your recipe makes 4 portions.

questions.question: What does 'batch cooking' mean?
options: Cooking one meal at a time

questions.question: What is a 'portion'?
options: An amount of food served to one person
questions.answer: An amount of food served to one person

questions.question: What does 'cost-effective' mean?
options: Good value for the money spent
questions.answer: Good value for the money spent

maths_section.instruction: Calculate the quantities needed for 20 portions (multiply by 5).

questions.question: Recipe: 400g mince for 4. How much for 20?
Total ingredient cost is £22. Price per portion?
